## Change

## Verification
- [ ] `npx vitest run` green
- [ ] New/changed reducer or state-machine logic has a test asserting the transition
- [ ] Pre-mortem run for non-trivial / refactor / async / state-machine diffs (see CLAUDE.md)
- [ ] For money-path changes: tested the *disagreement*, not just the happy path
